zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William de Keith Great Marischal of Scotland於1389年出生在英國蘇格蘭金加迪爾斯同哈文時，他的父親Sir Robert de Keith Great Marischal of Scotland27歲，母親Lady Matilda Urquhart of Troup, Baroness of Dunottar29歲。他於1414年4月26日與Mary - Mariota Hamilton of Cadzow在英國蘇格蘭金加迪爾登諾塔結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和10個女兒的父母。他去世於1444年10月在他的家鄉享年55歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭金加迪爾登諾塔。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William de Keith Great Marischal of Scotland于1389年出生在英国苏格兰金加迪爾斯同哈文时，他的父亲Sir Robert de Keith Great Marischal of Scotland27岁，母亲Lady Matilda Urquhart of Troup, Baroness of Dunottar29岁。他于1414年4月26日与Mary - Mariota Hamilton of Cadzow在英国苏格兰金加迪爾登諾塔结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和10个女儿的父母。他去世于1444年10月在他的家乡享年55岁，埋葬在苏格兰金加迪爾登諾塔。

nameMeanings.name: Keith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the lands of Keith in East Lothian. The placename is derived from British Celtic cait- ‘wood’. In the 17th century numerous bearers of this name settled in Ulster.
German: nickname from Middle High German kīt ‘sprout, offspring’.

History: George Keith (c. 1638–1716), born at Peterhead, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, came to NJ in or before 1685. In 1689 he settled in Philadelphia, where he became headmaster of the school now called the William Penn Charter School. He came into sharp collision with the Quaker leaders in PA and formed a separatist party known as the Christian Quakers, popularly known as ‘Keithians’.

variants.name: Kight
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of   Kite  .

variants.name: Keath
meanings: Scottish and English (mainly Cambridgeshire): variant of   Keith  .

variants.name: Kite
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English kete, kyte ‘kite’ (the bird of prey), perhaps a nickname for a rapacious person.
English: habitational name from one or more of the minor places with names deriving from Old English cȳte, cyte ‘cottage, hut, shed’, such as Kite Farm in Swalecliffe (Kent).

variants.name: Keeth
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Keith  .

variants.name: Keitt
meanings: Possibly an altered form of German   Keith   2.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William de Keith Great Marischal of Scotland was born in 1389, in Stonehaven, Kincardineshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Robert de Keith Great Marischal of Scotland, was 27 and his mother, Lady Matilda Urquhart of Troup, Baroness of Dunottar, was 29. He married Mary - Mariota Hamilton of Cadzow on 26 April 1414, in Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 10 daughters. He died in October 1444, in his hometown, at the age of 55, and was buried in Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William de Keith Great Marischal of Scotland est né en 1389, à Stonehaven, Kincardineshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Robert de Keith Great Marischal of Scotland, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Lady Matilda Urquhart of Troup, Baroness of Dunottar, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Mary - Mariota Hamilton of Cadzow le 26 avril 1414, à Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 10 filles. Il est décédé en octobre 1444, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William de Keith Great Marischal of Scotland 1389 in Stonehaven, Kincardineshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert de Keith Great Marischal of Scotland 27 und seine Mutter Lady Matilda Urquhart of Troup, Baroness of Dunottar 29. Er hat am 26. April 1414 in Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Mary - Mariota Hamilton of Cadzow geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 10 Töchter. Er starb im Oktober 1444 im Alter von 55 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William de Keith Great Marischal of Scotland è nato il nel 1389 nel Stonehaven, Kincardineshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Robert de Keith Great Marischal of Scotland, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Lady Matilda Urquhart of Troup, Baroness of Dunottar, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Mary - Mariota Hamilton of Cadzow il 26 aprile 1414, nel Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 10 figlie. Morì nel ottobre 1444, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William de Keith Great Marischal of Scotlandが1389年にイギリススコットランドキンカーディンエシュアイアストーネヘイベンで生まれた時，父Sir Robert de Keith Great Marischal of Scotlandは27歳，母Lady Matilda Urquhart of Troup, Baroness of Dunottarは29歳であった。1414年4月26日にイギリススコットランドキンカーディンエシュアイアダノッタルでMary - Mariota Hamilton of Cadzowと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と10人の娘の親であった。彼は1444年10月に故郷で55歳で死去し，スコットランドキンカーディンエシュアイアダノッタルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William de Keith Great Marischal of Scotland(이)가 1389년 영국 스코틀랜드 킨카딘실르 스톤하븐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert de Keith Great Marischal of Scotland(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Matilda Urquhart of Troup, Baroness of Dunottar(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1414년 4월 26일 영국 스코틀랜드 킨카딘실르 던타르에서 Mary - Mariota Hamilton of Cadzow(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 열 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1444년 10월 그의 고향에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 킨카딘실르 던타르에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Mary - Mariota Hamilton of Cadzow em 26 de abril de 1414, em Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 10 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William de Keith Great Marischal of Scotland родился в 1389 г. в местности стоунэавен, кинкардаинешир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Robert de Keith Great Marischal of Scotland было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Matilda Urquhart of Troup, Baroness of Dunottar, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary - Mariota Hamilton of Cadzow 26 апреля 1414 г. в местности дунноттар, кинкардаинешир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 10 дочерей. Он умер октябрь 1444 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности дунноттар, кинкардаинешир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William de Keith Great Marischal of Scotland nació en 1389, en Stonehaven, Kincardineshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Robert de Keith Great Marischal of Scotland, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Lady Matilda Urquhart of Troup, Baroness of Dunottar, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Mary - Mariota Hamilton of Cadzow el 26 de abril de 1414, en Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 10 hijas. Murió en octubre de 1444, en su pueblo, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Scotland.
